description: Update Moodle's site security settings to meet institutional compliance requirements. Log in as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!) and configure the password policy to be enabled with a minimum length of 12, at least 2 digits, 2 lowercase letters, 2 uppercase letters, 2 non-alphanumeric characters, and a maximum of 3 consecutive identical characters. Set the account lockout threshold to 5 attempts with an observation window and lockout duration of 15 minutes (900 seconds) each. Additionally, set the session timeout to 2 hours (7200 seconds). Ensure all changes are saved.
